intro: Gouldia angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved gouldia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a possible remedy for various ailments, such as wound healing and skin infections.
